title: 目標達成の後に・越えられない河

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
When she sees reporters clamoring over Satono
Diamond, who hasn't even debuted yet, Kitasan
Black realizes that what she lacks isn't just skill,
but also a brilliance that turns heads.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Meanwhile, her rival Brusquement not only has
great panache, she also has an innate connection
with Air Groove, who shares her past.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Kitasan Black's confidence hits rock bottom.
Then, Sakura Bakushin O arrives on the scene
with a rush of overwhelming sympathy.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Her boisterous nature reinvigorates Kitasan
Black, and the two of them decide to aim for the
St. Lite Kinen as their next goal in preparation for
the Satsuki Sho and Japanese Derby.
